tweets.text:
Today is Elon Musk’s 55th birthday.

Fun facts:

Elon became a millionaire at the age of 27.

Elon became a billionaire at the age of 41.

Elon became a trillionaire at the age of 55*.

Every 14 years trend. Lol

*We’ll round up since it’s a few weeks off.

tweets.text: MSTR has a market cap of $29.54 billion, yet owns just over $50 billion worth of Bitcoin. Not only does MSTR have an unrealized loss of nearly $14 billion on the Bitcoin it bought, but the market value of $MSTR stock is worth less than half of the money @Saylor spent to buy it!

thread_tweets.text: MSTR has a market cap of $29.54 billion, yet owns just over $50 billion worth of Bitcoin. Not only does MSTR have an unrealized loss of nearly $14 billion on the Bitcoin it bought, but the market value of $MSTR stock is worth less than half of the money @Saylor spent to buy it!
thread_tweets.full_text: MSTR has a market cap of $29.54 billion, yet owns just over $50 billion worth of Bitcoin. Not only does MSTR have an unrealized loss of nearly $14 billion on the Bitcoin it bought, but the market value of $MSTR stock is worth less than half of the money @Saylor spent to buy it!

thread_tweets.text: @GenaTheCroco @saylor That value counts the value of all the convertible debt and preferred shares Strategy issued to raise the money to buy Bitcoin. But all of that diluted the value of MSTR common stock.
thread_tweets.full_text: @GenaTheCroco @saylor That value counts the value of all the convertible debt and preferred shares Strategy issued to raise the money to buy Bitcoin. But all of that diluted the value of MSTR common stock.

thread_tweets.text: @chancerslife @saylor Not really, as if MSTR tried to sell its Bitcoin, the price of Bitcoin would crash. Bitcoin is over-valued. But my point is that Saylor as destroyed a lot of shareholder value by buying Bitcoin. He has not created it.
thread_tweets.full_text: @chancerslife @saylor Not really, as if MSTR tried to sell its Bitcoin, the price of Bitcoin would crash. Bitcoin is over-valued. But my point is that Saylor as destroyed a lot of shareholder value by buying Bitcoin. He has not created it.

thread_tweets.text: @KC_BULLLL @saylor Saylor needs to find larger buyers for MSTR's Bitcoin, off the market. MSTR needs to pay off all of its debt and buy back all the preferred shares. Not sure if that's even possible but that's the only solution.
thread_tweets.full_text: @KC_BULLLL @saylor Saylor needs to find larger buyers for MSTR's Bitcoin, off the market. MSTR needs to pay off all of its debt and buy back all the preferred shares. Not sure if that's even possible but that's the only solution.

thread_tweets.text: @gatorhaus265185 @saylor Until MSTR gets liquidated that is very unlikely to happen. Of course, even after MSTR is liqudated it's also highly unlikely.
thread_tweets.full_text: @gatorhaus265185 @saylor Until MSTR gets liquidated that is very unlikely to happen. Of course, even after MSTR is liqudated it's also highly unlikely.

최휘영 장관님과 관련 공무원 여러분 애쓰셨습니다.

저도 전임 명예 프로축구단장이자 심정적 붉은악마로서  예상밖 결과에 당황을 넘어 황당함을 느낍니다.

결국 인사가 만사임이 다시 한번 증명됐습니다. 능력보다 네편내편을 더 중시해 무능한 사람을 지휘관으로 선발하면 결과는 불보듯
